Name: Jellyfin Security
Description: Comprehensive Jellyfin security: TOTP & email 2FA, passkeys, OIDC/SSO sign-in (Google, GitHub, Authelia, Authentik, Keycloak, PocketID, Cloudflare Access, ...), brute-force IP banning, impossible-travel detection, per-user IP allowlist, device pairing, trusted browsers, and audit log.
Overview: Comprehensive Jellyfin security: 2FA, passkeys, OIDC/SSO, brute-force protection, impossible-travel detection, IP allowlist, and audit logging.
